overview: Houston Concierge Medicine & Wellness Center provides personalized primary care and integrative medical services tailored to individual health needs. They offer concierge memberships, comprehensive diagnostic testing, and preventive wellness services.
highlights: Concierge membership model with personalized care approach
Comprehensive diagnostic testing including VO2 Max, early cancer detection, and body composition analysis
Weight loss injection services with home testing kits available
targetAudience: Professionals and executives seeking personalized primary care, executive health screenings, and comprehensive wellness services.
